title: psychotria costivenia subsp. costivenia
intro: Psychotria costivenia subsp. costivenia, also known as the "Costivenia" or "Ecuadorian Wild Coffee", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The leaves of this plant have been found to possess medicinal properties, containing alkaloids such as psychotrine, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and act as an antioxidant. In Ecuadorian traditional medicine, Psychotria costivenia subsp. costivenia is often prepared as a tea or infused in water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is also sometimes used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
